channel.title: Cyberattaques | Casualtek
channel.description: Flux RSS de suivi, en Français, des cyberattaques rapportées dans la presse internationale. Maintenu par Valéry Rieß-Marchive (LeMagIT).

item.title: Mutuelle Familiale (FRA) autour du 17 mars 2026.
item.description: La Mutuelle Familiale a été victime d'un incident de cybersécurité le 17 mars, entraînant une indisponibilité temporaire de ses services. Des investigations sont en cours pour déterminer l'origine de l'attaque. La mutuelle recommande à ses adhérents de faire preuve de vigilance face à toute sollicitation suspecte.

item.title: Los Angeles County Metropolitan Transportation Authority (USA) autour du 20 mars 2026.
item.description: Le Los Angeles Metro a restreint l'accès à ses systèmes informatiques internes après avoir détecté une activité non autorisée, ce qui a perturbé certaines informations aux voyageurs et les options de rechargement de cartes TAP. Bien que les trains et les bus aient continué d'opérer normalement, l'agence a averti les usagers de recharger leurs cartes via des bornes physiques en attendant la résolution du problème. Aucune organisation n'a revendiqué la responsabilité de cet incident, bien que le site ransomware.live ait listé la ville de Los Angeles comme cible du groupe « Worldleaks » le 20 mars 2026.

item.title: Foster City (USA) autour du 19 mars 2026.
item.description: Les services publics de Foster City ont été suspendus à la suite d'une cyberattaque par ransomware découverte jeudi matin. Bien que les services d'urgence restent opérationnels, la ville enquête sur l'étendue de la brèche et déclare l'état d'urgence pour obtenir un soutien extérieur. Les employés municipaux travaillent avec des experts externes pour restaurer les systèmes et sécuriser les informations publiques potentiellement compromises.

item.title: Nelson Worldwide, LLC (USA) autour du 25 février 2026.
item.description: Nelson Worldwide experienced unauthorized access to their network on February 18, 2026, resulting in the potential exposure of personal information. An investigation determined that the impacted files contained full names. A cyberattack was claimed by Chaos on March 6.

item.title: FuturHealth, Inc. (USA) autour du 08 août 2025.
item.description: FuturHealth, Inc. suffered a data breach where an unauthorized actor viewed and copied certain files stored within their network between August 8, 2025, and August 14, 2025. The breach involved the names and other types of personal information of some individuals. FuturHealth is offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity restoration services to affected individuals.

item.title: Philadelphia Corporation for Aging (USA) autour du 25 juillet 2025.
item.description: Philadelphia Corporation for Aging experienced a technology issue that may have impacted some personal information, with unauthorized access to data occurring between July 10, 2025, and July 25, 2025. PCA is not aware of any actual or attempted misuse of the information. The organization is providing free credit monitoring services to affected individuals.

item.title: Jacobson Adler, LLC (USA) autour du 26 octobre 2025.
item.description: Jacobson Adler, LLC suffered a data breach between October 12, 2025, and October 26, 2025, resulting in unauthorized access to its network and potential exposure of personal information. The breach may have impacted names, Social Security numbers, and financial account information. The company is offering complimentary credit monitoring services to affected individuals.

item.title: Earthbound Holding, LLC (USA) autour du 18 décembre 2025.
item.description: Earthbound Holding, LLC experienced a data security incident on December 18, 2025, which may have involved personal information, including names and Social Security numbers. The incident was discovered on December 18, 2025, and the company took steps to secure the network and investigate. The breach may have included names in combination with Social Security numbers.

item.title: Navia Benefit Solutions, Inc. (USA) autour du 23 janvier 2026.
item.description: Navia Benefit Solutions, Inc. suffered a data breach where an unauthorized actor accessed and potentially acquired certain information between December 22, 2025, and January 15, 2026. The information that could have been impacted includes name, date of birth, Social Security number, phone number, and email address. Navia is providing access to credit monitoring services for 12 months to affected individuals.

item.title: Chapter 13 Trustee Office of Rod Danielson (USA) autour du 19 décembre 2025.
item.description: A data breach occurred, potentially exposing personal information. The breach was discovered in 2026, and the organization is taking steps to protect affected individuals. Identity protection services are being offered to those impacted. A cyberattack was claimed by INC Ransom on January 12, 2026.

item.title: Charlottesville Settlement Company (USA) autour du 04 septembre 2025.
item.description: Charlottesville Settlement Company experienced a data security incident where an unknown actor gained unauthorized access to their network on September 2, 2025, potentially accessing and acquiring certain files containing personal information. The incident was discovered on September 4, 2025, and a comprehensive review was conducted to determine the affected information. The company is offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity theft protection services to affected individuals.

item.title: Harper Executive Group, Inc. (USA) autour du 04 mars 2025.
item.description: Harper Executive Group experienced a network disruption that led to unauthorized access or acquisition of certain information within their systems. The incident occurred on or around March 3, 2025, and was discovered on January 14, 2026. The affected information may have included first and last names in combination with other data.

item.title: Neil I. Sidi, C.P.A. (USA) autour du 29 janvier 2026.
item.description: The breach notification does not specify a data breach incident. Instead, it provides information on how residents of various states can obtain a free copy of their credit report and take steps to prevent identity theft.

item.title: Elray Manufacturing Company (USA) autour du 19 novembre 2025.
item.description: Elray Manufacturing Company suffered a data security incident where an unknown actor gained access to their network and potentially acquired certain files containing personal information. The information involved includes names and Social Security numbers. Elray is offering complimentary credit monitoring and identity theft protection services.

item.title: Grayback Forestry, Inc. (USA) autour du 06 janvier 2026.
item.description: Grayback Forestry, Inc. experienced a data breach where an unauthorized actor accessed certain system files between January 5, 2026, and January 6, 2026, potentially affecting individual names.

item.title: Nacca & Capizzi, LLP (USA) autour du 04 décembre 2025.
item.description: An unauthorized individual accessed the network without authorization between November 26 and December 4, 2025, and took copies of certain files. The files may have contained names along with Social Security numbers and/or driver’s license numbers. The incident was discovered on February 4, 2026.

item.title: Jeff Anderson & Associates PA (USA) autour du 18 septembre 2025.
item.description: Jeff Anderson & Associates PA suffered a data breach in September 2025, where an unauthorized party gained access to parts of their computer environment and copied certain data. The breach impacted thousands of organizations that rely on the same firewall protection technology. The firm has offered complimentary credit monitoring services for 24 months through Experian.

item.title: Doctor Alliance (USA) autour du 13 novembre 2025.
item.description: Doctor Alliance experienced a network disruption and unauthorized access to files containing personal health information between October 31, 2025, and November 17, 2025. The affected data included names, addresses, dates of birth, Medicare numbers, medical records, and other health information. A cyberattack was claimed by Kazu on November 11, 2025.

item.title: OSI Systems, Inc. (USA) autour du 25 décembre 2025.
item.description: OSI Systems, Inc. suffered a data breach where certain files within their network were potentially accessed without authorization, resulting in unauthorized access to personal information including name and Social Security number. A cyberattack was claimed by INC Ransom on December 30, 2025.

item.title: MedPeds Associates of Sarasota (USA) autour du 02 septembre 2025.
item.description: MEDPEDS experienced a data breach on September 2, 2025, where an unknown person or entity gained access to their computer system, encrypted data, and viewed patient information. The breach involved name, date of birth, home address, phone number, and patient medical records. A cyberattack was claimed by Beast on September 16.
